questions.question_text: What does Emerson mean by “Whoso would be a man must be a non-conformist”? Discuss.
Maugham in “The Lotus Eater” projects that our circumstances will shape our personalities, decisions and resolves. Explain.
“The Love Song of J. Alfred Prufrock” is the song of being divided between passion and timidity. It is a song of frustration and emotional conflict. Discuss.
Keats is known as the master of sensuousness. Give arguments.
Eugene O’ Neill’s “Long Day’s Journey into Night” is a modern tragedy. Explain.
“Under the Net” represents both the political and philosophic views which Iris Murdock herself held at the time, but also her self-image. Discuss.
How have Feminist theories tried to reshape literary studies?
